title: Bambara Kannaley
overview: The movie is about Srikanth, a low class youth who goes to Ooty for a job and comes across Aarthy Agarwal. He falls in love with her. However her parents arrange for her wedding with Vikram Adhithya, who happens to be a slimy cookie
